case_title: CAROLE SOFFER DESIGN, LLC VS. ADAM MCLURE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAROLE SOFFER DESIGN, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MCLURE, ADAM DOES 1 THRU 25, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2008
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, NOSASE-C/OPICK-UPBOX. AS TO DEFENDANT MCLURE, ADAM
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-02-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAROLE SOFFER DESIGN, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED SEP-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCLURE, ADAM
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $335.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MCLURE, ADAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAROLE SOFFER DESIGN, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLURE, ADAM $21,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,085.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
